description: Ground-truth stage_num windows from the existing stage index for a selected well.
sql: SELECT * FROM (   SELECT     'Stage ' || CAST(stage_num AS text) AS window_label,     CAST(stage_start_ts AS timestamp) AS start_ts,     CAST(stage_end_ts AS timestamp) AS end_ts,     '#228B22' AS color,     sample_count   FROM featurestore:stage_index_v1   WHERE name = :well_name     AND stage_start_ts IS NOT NULL     AND stage_end_ts IS NOT NULL     AND CAST(stage_end_ts AS timestamp) >= (:start_time)::timestamp     AND CAST(stage_start_ts AS timestamp) <= (:end_time)::timestamp   ORDER BY CAST(stage_start_ts AS timestamp) ) q
